events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { tileId, x, z } — putts the selected ball one adjacent cell toward the target tile

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId, x, z } on ball click

events.name: CANCEL
events.description: Emits UI:{cancelEvent} with {} on cancel / deselect

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Pin flag at the hole plus wooden peg-wall borders along the rough.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Par
overridableConfigKeys.description: Stroke target — holing out at or under this value wins

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: 6×6 S-shaped fairway grid — takes priority over entity-derived tiles.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: The putting ball, starting at the tee (t00).

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for ui-minigolf-board-3d / MinigolfBoard3DOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

features.description: Pin flag at the hole plus wooden peg-wall borders along the rough.

par.description: Stroke target — holing out at or under this value wins

tiles.description: 6×6 S-shaped fairway grid — takes priority over entity-derived tiles.

units.description: The putting ball, starting at the tee (t00).

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.
